urdu transliteration text: Meray Dil Ki Sada Ya Hussain Sab Kaho Marhaba Ya Hussain
english translation text: My heart calls out O’ Hussain. Everyone proclaim salutations, O’ Hussain

urdu transliteration text:
Uski Nazar Meh Gairat Rahay Gi Jis Nay Kaha Ya Husain
Meray Dil Ki Sada Ya Hussain
My heart calls out O’ Hussain
english translation text: He would be respected who calls out O’ Hussain

urdu transliteration text:
Kis Noor Ki Amad  Hui Sajday Meh Hain Fatimah
Har Dour Ka Yazeed Ka Honay Laga Khatimah
english translation text:
Which light is born such that Fatimah is in prostration?
This is the beginning of the demolition of every era’s Yazeed

urdu transliteration text:
Karbobala Say Awaz Ayi Lo Agai Ya Hussain
Meray Dil Ki Sada Ya Hussain
My heart calls out O’ Hussain
english translation text: Karbala cried out, “Here comes my Hussain!”

urdu transliteration text:
Masroof Hu Gharoor Meh Ab Koi Beh Dar Nai
Futras Ka Tu Sardar Hai Urnay Meh Hamsar Nai
english translation text:
(Fitrus says): “I am boastful of the fact that there is none like me…”
“…You (Jibreel) are Fitrus’s leader, but not better than me in flight…”

urdu transliteration text:
Jibrail Daykho Meray Paru Par Ab Ha Likha Ya Hussain
Meray Dil Ki Sada Ya Hussain
My heart calls out O’ Hussain
english translation text: “O’ Jibreel, take a look at my wings – it has Ya Hussain written on them now!”

urdu transliteration text:
Taqdeer Nay Karwat Ha Li Bass Ik He Raat Meh
Bemar Ka Suraj Taluh Phir Ho Gaya Raat Meh
Hur’s fate changed completely in just one night
english translation text: It was as though the sun exposed its rays to him at night

urdu transliteration text:
Khaimeh Kay Dar Par Sar Ko Jhuka Kar Hur Nay Kaha Ya Hussain
Mray Dil Ki Sada Ya Hussain
My heart calls out O’ Hussain
english translation text: At the entrance of the tent, Hur stood embarrassed, calling out O’Hussain

urdu transliteration text: Woh Hath To Jahan Meh Phir Na Bhikari Huwa, Us Hath Pay Hallal Ka Ab Rizq Jari Huwa
english translation text: He would never suffer from poverty ever again. He who is blessed with sustenance from the Solver of problems

urdu transliteration text:
Senay Kay Uper Jo Hath Sunlo Keh Kay Laga Ya Hussain
Meray Dil Ki Sada Ya Hussain
My heart calls out O’ Hussain
english translation text: Those who sincerely call out O’Hussain
